raw.problem: Rooftop solar underperforms in dust-heavy Indian summers.
raw.opportunity_size: Rooftop degradation costs ~$300M/yr in lost yield.
raw.why_now: Self-cleaning films now last the panel lifetime.
raw.proof_of_work: Film holds 98% yield in 6-mo field test.
raw.success_scenario: If yield gap widens, payback is clear.

structured.solution: Self-cleaning film for rooftop solar panels.
